name: X (Twitter) MCP Server
what_it_does: X (Twitter) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with X's social platform — posting tweets and threads, searching tweets, retrieving user timelines, fetching engagement metrics, and integrating X's real-time social data into agent-driven social media management and monitoring workflows.
use_cases: Posting tweets and threads from social media management agents
Searching tweets for topics or keywords from social listening agents
Retrieving user timelines and engagement data from analytics agents
Monitoring brand mentions from reputation management agents
Generating social media content from content creation agents
Tracking trending topics and hashtags from market research agents
not_for: High-volume tweet reading (X API free tier is extremely limited)
Mass automated posting (violates X ToS; account risk)
Teams needing Instagram or LinkedIn (use those specific MCPs)
best_when: An agent needs to post to X or perform limited social listening — content publishing, basic search, or monitoring within X API's strict rate limits.
avoid_when: You need high-volume tweet reading or scraping — X's API pricing ($100/month minimum for basic access beyond free) makes heavy use expensive.

auth.notes: X API v2 OAuth 2.0 (for user context) or Bearer Token (app-only). X Developer App required. API key + secret + access token + access token secret for OAuth 1.0a (for write operations). Complex multi-token setup.

pricing.free_tier_limits: X API Free: 1,500 tweets/month write-only; very limited read
pricing.notes: X API pricing dramatically increased after 2023. Free tier allows posting but very limited reading. Basic tier ($100/month) for meaningful read access. Pro tier is very expensive. Community MCP is free.

performance.rate_limits: X API v2: 15 requests/15-minute window (free); 10,000 reads/month (Basic)

known_agent_gotchas: X API pricing is extremely expensive beyond free tier — $100/month minimum for meaningful access
Four-part OAuth credential set required: API key, API secret, access token, access token secret
Rate limits are per-endpoint and per-window: 15 requests/15 minutes on free tier
Free tier is essentially write-only — reading tweets requires paid subscription
X API has undergone massive changes post-2022 — community MCPs may lag API version
Community MCP — X API changes frequently under new ownership; verify current endpoint compatibility
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth 2.0 or OAuth 1.0a. GDPR. Community MCP. Store all four OAuth credentials securely. Create X app with minimum required permissions. Monitor rate limit usage carefully.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth 2.0/1.0a. GDPR. Community MCP. Secure all four OAuth credentials. Minimum permissions scope.
